premium.afterSignIn: After signing in, return here to complete your upgrade.

premium.paymentError: Something went wrong during payment verification. If you were charged, contact

footer.brandDesc: AI-powered health clarity for India. Verify claims, decode reports, find hospitals and more — in plain language.
footer.disclaimer: Educational only. Never diagnoses or prescribes. Always consult a qualified doctor.
footer.helpImproveDesc: Rate your experience, suggest a feature, or report a bug.

emergency.title: Emergency & First Aid
emergency.subtitle: Quick guides for medical emergencies. When in doubt — call 112.
emergency.disclaimer: These guides are for first-aid reference only. Always call emergency services for serious situations.

vaccines.title: Vaccine Schedule
vaccines.subtitle: India's national immunisation schedule — birth to adult.
vaccines.note: Schedules may vary. Always consult your child's paediatrician.

mentalHealth.subtitle: You're not alone. Resources and guidance for mental wellness.
mentalHealth.crisis: In crisis? Talk to someone now
mentalHealth.disclaimer: These resources are for information only. Always seek help from a qualified mental health professional.

insurance.title: Health Insurance Guide
insurance.subtitle: Plain-language guide to health insurance in India.
insurance.pmjayDesc: Free coverage up to ₹5 lakh per family per year for eligible families.
